item.title: You Maniacs! You Blew It Up! Ah, Damn You! God Damn You All to Hell!
item.description: They broke the broke the New York Times Pitchbot! This is so egregiously horrible that it has exceeded the Pitchbot's ability to parody the "Gray lady." It is a complete mind f%$# that a person who has dedicated many minutes every day to satirizing self described, "All the news that's fit to print," has found that the actual behavior of a NY Times reporter beyond parody.

item.title: Imgur !
item.description: I've been fighting with imgur all moring. A file is too large to up load. Its a 15 second file ? How is it too large ? I reformatted the file. Still to large. I try other files I'd loaded before those files are also too large. If this loads I'm a shit my self Edit: aaaaaaahhhhhhhhhh *$&@>$;$,@(#<$;@('>what ! I had to use web mode on my phone to upload -_- what's going on imgur ? Are you limiting my post ? Was there a complaint ?

The same dude, this is his follow-up video.
Cat tax. I found this small kitty a while ago when I was strolling in a city near mine. This kitty was behind a closed gate, so I don't think it was a stray.

item.dc:creator: TheWoodsAreVile

item.title: Day # whatever of me trying to change people’s minds about spiders
item.description: Happy Tuesday, Imgur! Sorry I was MIA yesterday; food poisoning got me good. Anyways, back to our regularly scheduled programming! . Spiders are similar to cats in that they’re frequently grooming themselves. Jumping spiders are covered in sensitive hairs called “setae” that take in a lot of sensory information. Therefore self-care is essential for Ms Bunnette! Self-care is essential for you, too. Relax your shoulders, unclench your jaw, and drink some water . MV Edit: does anyone have advice for self-publishing physical copies of a children’s book? If so PLEASE dm me! I wrote and illustrated a book about a jumping spider who helps a little girl through chemo. I just need to format and print it. Any help would be amazing!! https://imgur.com/gallery/DSwpaVn

item.title: Pollinators unite!
item.description: im sick of grass, im sick of the mowing and all the mowing everyone does is pretty bad for the environment. this stuff is also called mini clover. its good for pollinators and doesnt need mowing very much. not sure if its gonna take over completely or not but the few small patches i already had dont have any grass in them and look so pretty and so green.

item.title: What Happened Today #102
item.description: $148 million for dinner with Trump. That's what 220 anonymous crypto buyers finally paid today while white South Africans got refugee status and millions fleeing actual genocide remain blocked. America is dying off and being auctioned to the highest bidder. The price of admission is cruelty: 9,000 Afghans face deportation to Taliban rule, EPA scientists scramble for their jobs, and air traffic controllers break under failing systems. When access is for sale and suffering is policy, we can't afford to look away. Don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of https://www.govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Links! 1. https://go.govbrief.today/south-africans-arrive 2. https://go.govbrief.today/illinois-autism-data 3. https://go.govbrief.today/gop-school-vouchers 4. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-denies-bias 5. https://go.govbrief.today/epa-tells-scientists-reapply 6. https://go.govbrief.today/dhs-tps-afghanistan 7. https://go.govbrief.today/judges-allows-irs-dhs 8. https://go.govbrief.today/eeoc-ortiz-termination 9. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-crypto-dinner-promotion 10. https://go.govbrief.today/musk-boring-railroad 11. https://go.govbrief.today/wire-services-airforceone 12. https://go.govbrief.today/newark-ground-delay 13. https://go.govbrief.today/episcopal-church-leaves-resettlement

item.title: Sock hair [OC]
item.description:
It only took me 27 years to figure out how to tame my unmanageable hair… I just need a sock! All it took was a flippin’ sock!! So for any of you struggling, I bestow upon you, the knowledge of the hair sock <3 I would add a selfie for reference, but I would likely be sent into orbit for doing so! However if you must see the results, I added an IRL picture to the gram over here: https://www.instagram.com/p/DJm1mCzoPvB/?igsh=Y21uMmE4NjRicm8=
Cat tax! Ms. Beany is lookin’ for snacks! Seems like she’s found one (you <3)
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives

item.title: In October 1991,86-year-old oil tycoon was wheeled into a Houston strip club, where he fell in love with a woman who was working the day shift. The octogenarian's name was J. Howard Marshall, and he was worth over $1 billion.
item.description: In October 1991, an 86-year-old oil tycoon was wheeled into a Houston strip club, where he fell in love with a woman who was working the day shift. The octogenarian's name was J. Howard Marshall, and he was worth over $1 billion. And the woman was Anna Nicole Smith, a 23-year-old aspiring model. The two were reportedly smitten at first sight, and the very next day, Marshall gave Smith an envelope with $1,000 in cash and told her, "Don't go to work, my Lady Love. You don't have to ever go back to work." The rest was history. Marshall showered Smith with expensive gifts, including a red Mercedes convertible, access to a bungalow that had once belonged to Marilyn Monroe, and over $1 million worth of jewelry. And shortly after Smith found fame as a Playboy model, the pair married in 1994 — but their wedded bliss lasted just 14 months before Marshall died.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: Not in great taste given recent experiences...
item.description: Small rant incoming. Over the past four or so years whatever company owns imgur has done everything they possibly can to try and drive it into the ground with adverts, tacky theme days, really awful app updates that frequently make it unusable, and don't get me STARTED on the tagging and filtering system, or the politics content deliberately driven to raise engagement, without a single thought that allowing people to spam untagged politics content would drive a HUGE number of people away from the site. (it's just a fact, it's what's happened, I've got no skin in the game so don't give me shit about politics please) I've been here thirteen years or so. Eighteen months or more ago my DMs got revoked. I was having important, heartfelt conversations with people and then I just vanished on them. I sent OVER TEN support tickets and got NOTHING back. It wasn't until EVENTUALLY one of the mods read a comment I made on here they sorted it. What was it, you ask? Had I been rude? Unpleasant? No. The email that I had verified with them OVER A DECADE ago was suddenly not verified. I spent over a year with no DMs and they just wouldn't get back to me. I find it really fucking condescending that when you open the mental health awareness page (click the heart in imgur) you get this.... Table of comparison. We aren't children, for the most part, we're aware that community is good for us, so stop ruining ours and actually listen to us so we can HAVE a fucking community! This is NO shade on other users here BTW, I love you all and that's why I'm still here. Just sad what they've done to the place. TL;DR - I find the team at Imgur incredibly condescending and want them to do better by us as a COMMUNITY, as that's their agenda this week. I'm not expecting people to love this post but it's just how I feel. Apologies for any offence caused and no shade meant to be thrown on individual mods either, Martyn, Satan and the like do really good work. It's not on them it's their managers.
item.dc:creator: ebonyfaery

item.title: My gallery is 80% memes, 15% accidental smudged shots and 5% pics I'll never check again after making them. Best. Era. To. Live. In.
